design_philosophy: Clean layouts, massive whitespace, soft shadows, neutral colors, minimal animations, professional typography, enterprise feel (Stripe/Vercel styling principles). Progressive disclosure of complex data.

spacing_and_layout.sidebar: w-[280px] bg-[#FFFFFF] border-r border-[#E2E8F0] h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 hidden lg:flex flex-col
spacing_and_layout.top_navigation: h-[72px] bg-[#FFFFFF] border-b border-[#E2E8F0] sticky top-0 z-40 flex items-center px-8 lg:ml-[280px]
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: The Control Room Grid (Bento style). Base grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6.

components.cards: bg-[#FFFFFF] rounded-[12px] border border-[#E2E8F0] shadow-sm overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-[#0F172A] text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-[12px] font-medium hover:bg-[#111827] transition-all shadow-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0F172A]/20
buttons.secondary: bg-[#FFFFFF] text-[#0F172A] border border-[#E2E8F0] px-4 py-2 rounded-[12px] font-medium hover:bg-[#F8FAFC] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E2E8F0]

components.inputs: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#E2E8F0] text-[#111827] rounded-[12px] px-3 py-2 placeholder:text-[#64748B] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0F172A]/20 focus:border-[#0F172A]

badges.active: bg-[#16A34A]/10 text-[#16A34A] border-none px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold
badges.used: bg-[#475569]/10 text-[#475569] border-none px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold
badges.expired: bg-[#F59E0B]/10 text-[#F59E0B] border-none px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold
badges.revoked: bg-[#DC2626]/10 text-[#DC2626] border-none px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold

components.tables: w-full text-left text-sm text-[#475569]. Headers: text-[#64748B] font-medium border-b border-[#E2E8F0] pb-3. Rows: border-b border-[#E2E8F0] last:border-0 hover:bg-[#F8FAFC]/50 transition-colors.

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #E2E8F0 everywhere for structural definition (tables, cards, inputs)
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: AVOID. Use solid white (#FFFFFF) backgrounds for dropdowns, drawers, and modals with strong drop shadows.
visual_enhancers.animations: Minimal. Use standard 200ms ease-in-out for hover states and subtle fade-in for modals/drawers.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 2 or 1.5. Keep sizes 16px to 20px for inline icons. Use #64748B for neutral icons, primary colors for active states.

accessibility.focus_states: High contrast focus rings required on all inputs and buttons. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-1 focus:ring-[#0F172A]
accessibility.contrast: Ensure text colors against backgrounds meet at least AA standard.

empty_state_illustration.description: Modern apartment building exterior. Use as a stylistic header or empty state background image.

auth_background.description: Minimalist apartment building against blue sky. Perfect for the login/auth split-screen background.

security_abstract.description: Professional abstract security data visualization. Use in the Settings or Logs header area if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the provided color hex codes. Do NOT use default Tailwind colors (e.g., bg-blue-500). Use custom arbitrary values like bg-[#0F172A] or define them in tailwind.config.js.
Implement the layout with a sticky 280px sidebar and a 72px top nav on desktop.
On mobile, the sidebar should collapse into a hamburger menu (Sheet component from shadcn).
Use standard HTML structure and Shadcn UI components. Ensure all components use the rounded-[12px] radius instead of shadcn's default.
Implement the 'Expiring Soon' widget and KPI cards using the bento grid system.
For tables, implement responsive containers (overflow-x-auto) so they don't break the layout on smaller screens.
The Guard Verification page needs a HUGE, centered PIN input (consider using an OTP input component or large text fields).
Add data-testid attributes to ALL buttons, inputs, links, and table rows.
Replace standard loading spinners with Skeleton loaders for tables and dashboards.
Use Lucide-React for icons, stick to sizes 16-24px max.
Avoid glassmorphism. Avoid excessive gradients. Adhere strictly to the clean, enterprise Stripe/Vercel aesthetic.
